payload.author: claude
payload.body: Fixed: score.py resolves the release trust binary (TRUST_BIN overridable), validates it up front, and fails loud with the exact build command + exit 2 rather than faking a 0% catch rate. Added opt-in --build to bootstrap (cargo build -p trust-rustc; then RUSTC_WRAPPER=... cargo build --release -p trust). Verified: missing binary exits 2; present binary reproduces run 005 catch rates idempotently.
